title: pavetta bourdillonii
intro: Pavetta bourdillonii, also known as the forest musk, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pavetta bourdillonii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
